rawContent: {"stage":"review-fix","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Import path for the new middleware file must be correct — ensure the module resolves without conflicts with similarly named files in src/middleware.","scope":"src/middleware"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"The X-RateLimit-Reset header timestamp must be set correctly; this bug was caught in a previous review pass and fixed — watch for it.","scope":"src/middleware/rateLimit.ts"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Match existing middleware file naming: use kebab-case (rate-limiter.ts) rather than camelCase (rateLimit.ts) to stay consistent with the codebase.","scope":"src/middleware"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Co-locate Vitest tests next to source (rateLimit.test.ts beside rateLimit.ts) and mirror the established test patterns: describe/it/expect/vi, afterEach with vi.useRealTimers(), and .destroy() cleanup","scope":"testing"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"When reusing patterns from an existing implementation (e.g. factory pattern, SlidingWind
